title: Campaign Monitor vs Sender (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Sender: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Sender: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Sender comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Sender targets small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting A Generous Free Plan

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting a generous free plan

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Sender?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Sender is stronger for small businesses wanting a generous free plan.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Sender?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sender to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
